label: Newsletter Signup
description: An email newsletter signup form with heading, description, and inline email input with submit button. For lead capture. Use on landing pages or footer areas. Layout: centered section with horizontal form (email input + submit), optional privacy note. Form POSTs to configurable action URL.

test_data.heading: Stay Updated
test_data.description: Get the latest news, tips, and product updates delivered straight to your inbox. No spam, ever.
test_data.privacy_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
